item.title: Time Is a Snake Biting Its Own Tail
item.description: Márquez lays out a peculiar notion of time in the rise and fall of the Buendía family.

item.title: In Defence of Useless Knowledge
item.description: Whenever someone asks what my studies are good for, I think of that tree in Zhuangzi.

item.title: About
item.description:
Education

Università di Bologna · Ph.D. Candidate, Department of the Arts INF/01 Computer Science

Beijing Institute of Technology · M.A. in Design, GPA 3.74/4.0 National Scholarship (Top 0.2%), First-Class Academic Scholarship

Politecnico di Milano · Exchange Program Service Design and Innovation, Product Life Cycle Management
